mapper.select: SELECT mr.*, m.name AS material_name, m.code AS material_code FROM material_record mr LEFT JOIN material m ON mr.material_id = m.id WHERE mr.material_id = #{materialId} ORDER BY mr.create_time DESC
SELECT mr.*, m.name AS material_name, m.code AS material_code FROM material_record mr LEFT JOIN material m ON mr.material_id = m.id ORDER BY mr.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_record (material_id, type, quantity, before_quantity, after_quantity, operate_time) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{type}, #{quantity}, #{beforeQuantity}, #{afterQuantity}, #{operateTime})
